_Included below are frequently asked questions that you may have about the Thinkific Mobile app and the Branded Mobile app. Most of the answers apply to both Thinkific and Branded Mobile Apps. Click to expand the dropdowns within each category for more information._

[![](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/17440677209111)](https://thinkific.com/branded-mobile/?utm_source=knowledge_base&utm_medium=help_center&utm_campaign=BrandedMobile2023)

## In this article:

[Basic Functionality](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10114502955671-Mobile-App-FAQ-Frequently-Asked-Questions#basic)

[Courses](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10114502955671-Mobile-App-FAQ-Frequently-Asked-Questions#courses)

[Communities](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10114502955671-Mobile-App-FAQ-Frequently-Asked-Questions#communities)

[Creator Experience and Customization](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10114502955671-Mobile-App-FAQ-Frequently-Asked-Questions#customization)

[Branded Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10114502955671-Mobile-App-FAQ-Frequently-Asked-Questions#branded)

[In-App Purchases](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10114502955671-Mobile-App-FAQ-Frequently-Asked-Questions#purchases)

## Basic Functionality

**Can students do everything on the app without going to the web version?**

The app is considered an additive complement to the web experience. From our research, students want to use the app for learning on the go and accessing creators' content in the most convenient way for them. This can include lessons, interacting in communities, and finding out what’s going on via notifications.

Students (depending on their enrolment) will be able to spend the majority of time on the app, however, they will still need to access the web to complete actions, such as:

- enrolling in / purchasing learning products\*
- participating in live events
- updating their account / accessing certificates

\*In-App Purchases are exclusively available to creators using Branded apps. If you are interested, check out our [Branded Mobile app solution](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/13166713617431)!

**What are some unique Mobile features?**

See this article for the list of exclusive Mobile features: [Mobile-Only Features](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/13489267385111).

**Does the Thinkific Mobile app work everywhere or are there location limitations?**

There are no regional access limitations. We are global, so the Thinkific Mobile app works everywhere Thinkific does.

**What are the operating system requirements?**

For mobile device operating system requirements, see: [OS (Operating System) Requirements for the Thinkific Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10094941410327).

**Will my users be able to access both my Courses and Communities on the App?**

Yes! Your users will be able to access both communities and courses, however, there are some features that are not currently supported. To learn more, check out [Supported Course Features](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10113800644631), Supported Community Features.

**Can I hide my school from the search results in the Thinkific Mobile app login screen?**

Students are able to search for all Thinkific schools that have enabled a Thinkific Mobile app feature from the login screen. It is not possible to hide a specific school from this list. To hide your school, you would need to disable the Mobile app feature. Please note that this will prevent all students from accessing your site via a mobile app.

If you are just testing the app and using a test site with no students or a sandbox site, another option is to give your school an obscure name, so it cannot be easily found by others.

If hiding your school from the search result is important to you, we recommend considering a Branded mobile app solution: [Maximize Your Brand Potential With the Branded Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/13166713617431).

![](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/16448680331543)

**My student has logged in to the app, but they do not see any courses or communities they are enrolled in?**

Your students will need to make sure they are using the right email when logging in or using the same login option that they used to create an account.

Specifically, if a student created an account using one option (e.g. an email), but is signing in using Apple SSO with the _Hide My Email_ feature enabled, they will create a new account instead of accessing their original one. In cases where this happens, you can always [delete the duplicate student account.](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030737213)

See more troubleshooting tips here: [Mobile App Troubleshooting](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10113874842903).

## Courses

**Can my students access content offline?**

No, at the moment, the Thinkific Mobile App does not support the delivery of content offline. You can allow your students to download certain lesson content (videos, PDFs, audio) and they can view it directly on their devices.

We are working hard on bringing the ability to access content offline to the mobile app! Stay tuned for more updates: [Mobile App Recent Updates](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14454992010135).

**Can my users download files from lessons?**

Yes! Both Downloads and PDF lesson types are available on the Mobile App. Additionally, you can allow your students to download certain lesson content (videos, PDFs, audio) and they can view it directly on their devices. To learn more about supported lesson types within your Courses, check out [Supported Course Features](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10113800644631).

**Is there a workaround you recommend for on-lesson discussions?**

At this time we do not plan to support on-lesson discussion in the app. For creators looking to facilitate course and lesson discussions, we encourage you to create a [Community space](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/4404886915223) linked to your course material. This will allow your students to easily access a community from within a course and vice versa, keeping the conversation going.

**Will Webhooks, such as Lesson Completion, Enrollment Completed, etc. be triggered when lessons or courses are completed via the app? Will it work with Zapier Lesson Completed or Course Completed triggers?**

Yes, any time a student completes lessons or courses on the Mobile app, their progress is updated, similar to how it would be on the web version of Thinkific. This means that webhooks that use a Lesson Completed or an Enrollment Completed event or Zapier using a Lesson Completed or a Course Completed triggers will fire.

**Does the course progress in the app transfer to the web version and vice versa?**

Yes. If a student completes a lesson on the mobile app, it will be marked as complete in the web version as well. This is also true for the reverse.

**Can my students leave course reviews using the mobile app?**

Not at the moment. Students cannot leave [course reviews](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030351674) or see course reviews using the mobile app. Your students will need to use the web version to complete these actions.

## Communities

**Can community members upload media to their posts using the Mobile App?**

Yes! Community members can add media, videos, and files to their posts using the Mobile App. To learn more about how your users will experience communities on the Mobile App, check out [Communities in the Mobile App (Student Resource)](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10569187699607).

**Can community members unsubscribe from in-app or push notifications or choose which notifications they want to receive?**

It is not possible to unsubscribe from push, in-app, or web app notifications or customize which push or in-app notifications your community members will receive. They can unfollow specific posts individually if they do not want to get updates about new comments or replies. They can also unsubscribe from all email community notifications by following the instructions here: [Community Guide (Student Resource)](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360034240774#notifications).

**Why do my community members not receive push notifications?**

Your community members need to ensure that the Thinkific Mobile app has permission to send notifications. They can enable these permissions within the app, see the instructions here: [Communities in the Mobile App (Student Resource)](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10569187699607#notifications).

## Creator Experience and Customization

**Can I create learning products or manage my site using the app?**

No, the Thinkific Mobile App does not support school administration. Site Owners and Admins (and users with other roles other than Student) will need to use the web version of Thinkific.

**If I update or add new content, will it reflect in the Thinkific Mobile App?**

Yes! However, you won't be able to make any changes from within the app. Any changes you make must be done on the web (browser) version of your site, and they will then be reflected for your audience in the Mobile App!

**How do I make my products available on the Mobile App?**

To make your products available on the Mobile App, you'll need to enable Mobile from the Settings in your Admin Dashboard. To learn more about how to do this, visit our article: [Increase Engagement With the New Thinkific Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10664253689367).

**How do I add my logo to the login screen or change brand colors in the Thinkific app?**

The app follows all branding as set by the default course player/community color. For detailed instructions, see: [Style and Logo Settings for Your Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/11937814176919). If you are using a [Branded mobile app](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/13166713617431), you can customize your app with your choice of primary colors, text colors, button styles, and more to suit your design preferences.

**Can the app be enabled in dark mode?**

Not at this time. The app follows all branding as set by the default course player/community color. For detailed instructions, see: [Style and Logo Settings for Your Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/11937814176919). If you are using a [Branded mobile app](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/13166713617431), you can customize your app with your choice of primary colors, text colors, button styles, and more to suit your design preferences: [Branded Mobile: How Can I Customize My Branded App?](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/18806564986647)

**Can I change the page structure of the app?**

No. Thinkific manages how lessons, pages, and the app look overall. You can customize the color scheme and your logo. For detailed instructions, see: [Style and Logo Settings for Your Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/11937814176919). If you are using a [Branded mobile app](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/13166713617431), you can customize your app with your choice of primary colors, text colors, button styles, and more to suit your design preferences: [Branded Mobile: How Can I Customize My Branded App?](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/18806564986647)

**Can I use Thinkific App Store apps with the mobile app?**

No, [Thinkific App Store apps](https://apps.thinkific.com/) are not currently supported in the Thinkific Mobile app or a Branded Mobile app.

**Do the Thinkific Mobile app and Branded apps support all languages?**

Both the Thinkific mobile app and Branded apps support the following languages: Chinese - Traditional, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hungarian, Italian, Japanese, Latvian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Slovenian, Spanish, Spanish - Mexican, Swedish, Turkish, Vietnamese.

The language setting for the mobile app is determined by the language of the device and applies to the default text only (e.g. buttons, tab names, etc).

## Branded Mobile App

**What are some unique Branded Mobile features?**

See this article for the list of exclusive Branded Mobile features: [Branded Mobile-Only Features](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/13489267385111#branded).

**Can I have more than one branded app?**

Yes, you can have more than one branded app. Each app incurs a monthly fee and is specific to a Thinkific site (not multiple sites).

**How much maintenance will I need for the app? Who will supply update files or patches?**

You will own and have the power to edit the look and feel of their app store listing and respond to reviews.

The great news is that there is no maintenance required from you when it comes to the app functionality! We have a dedicated team who are regularly making improvements to the functionality of the app, supporting all technical improvements and ensuring the app runs well for your audience.

**Can I start with the Thinkific app and then switch to a Branded app later?**

Yes! You are welcome to try our Thinkific mobile app first and switch to a Branded app after. The Branded app will have your own name, branding, and app store listings, so your students will need to download it separately from the Thinkific mobile app. Note that once you have the Branded app enabled, your school will be removed from the Thinkific App search.

**Apple / Google is asking me to update the agreements. What does it mean?**

Both Apple and Google require you, as the account owner of your app store accounts, to agree to certain terms and conditions to make use of their app stores. Occasionally, brand new agreements or new versions of an existing agreement become available and must be signed before we can upload a new version of the app. Follow the instructions below to sign these agreements: [Branded Mobile: Navigate Your App Listings.](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14511415917719)

Note that failure to sign these agreements can lead to the delay in new version rollout for your app.

## In-App Purchases

**Can I sell my products through my Branded app?**

Yes! Take your audience’s learning journey to new heights! Your users can now expand their skills by purchasing new and select products directly within your mobile app. With Apple and Google Play’s in-app purchase systems, they can easily tap, purchase, and get access to new select products.

This feature is exclusive to creators using Branded apps. For most branded apps, in-app purchases will be required in order for your app to be approved in the app stores.

Learn more here: [Branded Mobile: In-App Purchases](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16261125243159).

**Do I have to sell my products through my Branded app?**

You do not have to sell your products exclusively through Branded apps. However, for most branded apps, in-app purchases will be required in order for your app to be approved in the app stores. This is the requirement set by Apple and Google.

Learn more here: [Branded Mobile: In-App Purchases](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16261125243159).

**Why am I required to offer in-app purchases?**

For most branded apps, in-app purchases will be required in order for your app to be approved in the app stores. This is the requirement set by Apple and Google.

Learn more here: [Branded Mobile: In-App Purchases](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16261125243159).

**Could I still launch a branded app if I don't want to offer in-app purchases?**

Apple [requires](https://developer.apple.com/app-store/review/guidelines/#payments) that any digital goods (such as paid Thinkific courses, etc) purchasable outside of the Apple App Store **must** also be available to purchase within the branded mobile app using [in-app purchases](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16261125243159). If your account includes paid courses, it is likely to be flagged during the review process. For more information, see here: [Branded Mobile: Important Considerations](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14290873077911#iapreqs)

**What products can I sell through my Branded app?**

For the full list of supported products, see: [Branded Mobile: In-App Purchases](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16261125243159#howto).

**What is the fee for selling products through my Branded app?**

All in-app purchases are processed through Apple and Google, which means that they bypass standard Thinkific checkout. Money will be deposited directly into your bank account. All in-app purchases will be charged a 30% fee by Apple and Google. Apply for a reduced rate to reduce the fee to 15% by following the instructions [here](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16261125243159#faq).

_Ready to create and set up your own branded app on Android? This article will walk you through the necessary steps to help you submit your branded mobile app to the Apple App Store._

[![](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/17440937410199)](https://thinkific.com/branded-mobile/?utm_source=knowledge_base&utm_medium=help_center&utm_campaign=BrandedMobile2023)

## In this article:

[About This Feature](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#about)

[Important Considerations](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#important)

[Step 1: Prepare and Grant Access to Your Android Branded Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#one)

[Create a Google Play Console Account](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#createaccount)

[Finish Setting Up Your Developer Account](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#h_01JNPRH0AMPJDMHC9KM4G8ZK7N)

[Create Your App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#createapp)

[Grant Thinkific Access to Your Account](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#grantaccess)

[Step 2: Set up your Google Cloud environment](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#two)

[Option 1: Set up a Google Cloud Project under an Organization](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#option1)

[Option 2: Set up a Google Cloud Project without an Organization](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#two:~:text=of%20this%20guide.-,Option%202%3A%20Set%20up%20a%20Google%20Cloud%20Project%20without%20an%20Organization,-Choose%20this%20option)

[Step 3: Set Up In-App Purchases in the Google Play Store](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#four)

[Create a Payments Profile in Google Play](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#payments)

[Reduce Your App Store Fees](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#reduce)

[Troubleshooting](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#troubleshooting)

## About This Feature

Branded Mobile fits into your audience’s existing routines, making it easier for them to learn and engage with your content — all on their own schedule. This means higher course completion rates, improved student satisfaction, and more revenue opportunities for your business.

The Thinkific team will work with you to build your own branded app and ensure that it is approved by Apple and Google. However, there are certain steps that need to be completed by you. These steps are outlined below.

## Important Considerations

- We _strongly recommend_ creating your Google Play Console account as soon as possible. Creating a developer account in advance can help shorten the time it takes to submit the app.
- The account holder of your Play Console account may be required to submit verification information periodically. For more information, see: [Maintain Your App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/25781308626967)
- For the Apple App Store instructions, see: [Prepare and Submit Your iOS Branded Mobile App.](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510359514647)

## Step 1: Prepare and Grant Access to Your Android Branded Mobile App

First things first, you'll need a Google Play Console account! This is where the Thinkific team will build your Android mobile app and where you'll manage it.

### Create a Google Play Console Account

1. Sign up for a [Google Play Console Developer account](https://play.google.com/console/signup)
1. For step-by-step instructions, see Google's article: [Register for a Play Console developer account](https://support.google.com/googleplay/android-developer/answer/6112435?hl=en#zippy=)
2. When choosing a _developer account type_, select **Organization**

> For more information about registering as an Organization, see: [Branded Mobile: Why Do I Need Apple and Google Organization Accounts?](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/15163907994775)

> There is a one-time fee associated with a Google Play Console account. A paid account is required in order to distribute your app on the Google Play Store.

### Finish Setting Up Your Developer Account

Complete Google's verification steps which are required to submit your app for review and publish it on the Play Store.

1. In [Google Play Console](https://play.google.com/console), navigate to the **Home** page from the left sidebar
2. In the notification banner with the heading _Finish setting up your developer account_, follow the prompts to verify your identity and verify your organization's website

![Finish setting up your developer account action item banner](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/30464930035479)

### Create Your App

To get started we'll create your app in Google Play Console.

1. In [Google Play Console](https://play.google.com/console), select the All Apps page from the left sidebar
2. Click **Create app**
3. On the next screen, complete the following details:
1. Under App Name, enter your app name as you want it to appear in the app store
2. Under Default language, select your app’s default language
3. Under App or game, select **App**
4. Under Free or paid, select **Free**
5. Under Declarations, check each box
4. Click **Create app**

### Grant Thinkific Access to Your Account

To help build and submit your app to the Google Play Store, Thinkific will need access to your account.

1. In your [Play Console](https://play.google.com/console), select **Users & Permissions** on the left-hand side
2. Select **Invite New Users**
3. Enter the following information:
1. Email: svc-mobileapp-mgt@thinkific.com
2. Access Expiry Date: leave unchecked
4. Under Permissions, select the **Account Permissions** tab
1. Check the **Admin (all permissions)** box
2. Click on **Invite User**
3. Click the **App Permissions** tab
4. Click **Add App**
5. Select the app you created earlier and click **Apply**
6. Ensure the following options are selected:
      1. App Access: View App information (read-only)
      2. App Access: Edit and delete draft apps
      3. Releases: Release to productions, exclude devices, and use Play App Signing
      4. Release apps to testing tracks
7. Click **Apply**
8. Click **Invite User**
9. Confirm your selection by clicking **Send Invite**

The invite will be automatically sent to the Thinkific team. See this article for detailed information: [Add developer account users and manage permissions](https://support.google.com/googleplay/android-developer/answer/9844686?hl=en).

## Step 2: Set up your Google Cloud environment

#### Option 1: Set up a Google Cloud Project under an Organization

> Choose this option if:
>
> - Your company already uses Google Workspace or Cloud Identity
> - You want long-term ownership tied to your company, not an individual person

### Set up Google Cloud for Your Organization

1. Sign in to [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/) using your work email address (example: name@companyemail.com)
2. Click the menu icon on the top left corner
3. Under _Products_, select **Google Cloud Setup**

_Note: If you can't find it within the sidebar, click **View all products**_

4. Under the _Production_ heading, click **Start**
5. Click **Begin the setup**
6. Follow the prompts to complete 'Task 1: Organization'

_Note: Tasks 2-10 are not required at this time_


### Add an "Organization Policy Administrator" Role to Your Organization

**Note: This step is not required for organizations that were created before May 3, 2024.**

1. Select your organization's name from the resource selector beside the Google Cloud logo (it will show a building icon next to it, not 3 hexagons)
![Your organization name in drop down menu](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/26328011922839)
2. Click the **Menu** icon (3 lines), then **IAM & Admin**, then **IAM**
3. Click **Grant Access**
4. Under _Add Principals_, click the **New principals** input field and type in your Google account holder email address (the one you're already signed in with)
5. Under _Assign Roles_, click the **Select a role** drop down menu and type in "Organization Policy Administrator"
6. Click **Save**

### Allow Service Account Key Creation for Your Organization

**Note: This step is not required for organizations that were created before May 3, 2024.**

01. Click the **Menu** icon (3 lines), then **IAM & Admin**, then **Organization policies**
02. In the Filter search bar, type or paste in "Disable service account key creation"
    ![Filter for "disable service account creation" constraint](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/31113394205591)
03. In the screenshot shown above, you'll see that two constraints are shown. You will need to complete the steps below for both constraints
04. Click the first **Disable service account key creation**
05. Click **Manage Policy**
06. Under _Policy source_, select **Override parent's policy**
07. Under _Rules_, if there is an existing Rule, click the trash can icon to delete it
08. Click **Add a rule**
09. Under _Enforcement_, select **Off**
10. Click **Set policy**
11. Repeat steps 4-10 for the second **Disable service account key creation** constraint

### Create a Google Cloud Project

We use a Google Cloud Project to store information related to your app.

1. Click the resource selector beside the Google Cloud logo in the top left corner
2. Click **New Project**
3. In the _Project name_ field, enter your app's name

_Important: your app's name should match the name you input in your Thinkific admin so that we can identify your project from our side_

4. Under _Location_, click **Browse**
5. Select the organization you created earlier
6. Click **Create**
7. Once your project is created, you'll see a notification under the bell icon

![Notifications panel](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/31098700234519)

8. Click **Select Project**

### Grant Thinkific Access to Your Google Cloud Project

1. Ensure your project/app's name is displayed beside the Google Cloud logo (it will show an icon of 3 hexagons beside it, not a building icon)
![Project name selected in resource selector](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/26328109157783)
2. Click the **Menu** icon (3 lines), then **IAM & Admin**, then **IAM**
3. Click **Grant Access**
4. Under _Add principals_, enter our email: [svc-mobileapp-mgt@thinkific.com](mailto:svc-mobileapp-mgt@thinkific.com)
5. Under _Assign Roles_, click **Select a role**
6. Under _Quick Access_, click **Basic**
7. On the right column under _Roles_, click **Owner**
8. Click **Save**

> If you are encountering an error while saving, see the [Troubleshooting](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#troubleshooting) section at the bottom of this guide.

#### Option 2: Set up a Google Cloud Project _without_ an Organization

> Choose this option if:
>
> - You do not use Google Workspace or Cloud Identity
>
> - You want the fastest, lowest-friction setup

### Create a Google Cloud Project

We use a Google Cloud Project to store information related to your app.

1. Sign in to [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/) using any Google account (such as a Gmail account, example: appname@gmail.com)
2. Click the resource selector beside the Google Cloud logo in the top left corner
3. Click **New Project**
4. In the _Project name_ field, enter your app's name

_Important: your app's name should match the name you input in your Thinkific admin so that we can identify your project from our side_

5. Click **Create**

_Note: If you are encountering an error while saving, see the_ [_Troubleshooting_](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#troubleshooting) _section at the bottom of this guide._

6. Once your project is created, you'll see a notification under the bell icon

![Notifications panel](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/31098700234519)

7. Click **Select Project**

### Grant Thinkific Access to Your Google Cloud Project

1. Ensure your project/app's name is displayed beside the Google Cloud logo (it will show an icon of 3 hexagons beside it, not a building icon)
![Project name selected in resource selector](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/26328109157783)
2. Click the **Menu** icon (3 lines), then **IAM & Admin**, then **IAM**
3. Click **Grant Access**
4. Under _Add principals_, enter our email: [svc-mobileapp-mgt@thinkific.com](mailto:svc-mobileapp-mgt@thinkific.com)
5. Under _Assign Roles_, click **Select a role**
6. Under _Quick Access_, click **Basic**
7. On the right column under _Roles_, click **Owner**
8. Click **Save**

## Step 3: Set Up In-App Purchases in the Google Play Store

If your website offers paid digital content to the general public, you will be required to include [In-App Purchases](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16261125243159-Branded-Mobile-In-App-Purchases). If all of your courses are free, are sold primarily to businesses (B2B), or are bundled with physical goods or services, you may be exempt from this requirement - please let Thinkific know as soon as possible if you think you may be exempt from requiring In-App Purchases.

### Create a Payments Profile in Google Play

1. In your [Play Console](https://play.google.com/console), open the **Settings** menu on the left-hand side
2. Select **Payments profile**
3. Create your payments profile. For more information, see: [Create a payments profile](https://support.google.com/paymentscenter/answer/7161426?hl=en)

### Reduce Your App Store Fees

This optional step allows you to reduce your app store fees from 30% to 15%. The Google Play Store offers reduced rates to qualified businesses. To enrol in this program, follow the instructions outlined here: [Enrol in the Google Play Store 15% service fee tier](https://support.google.com/googleplay/android-developer/answer/10632485).

## Troubleshooting

**The 'Domain Restricted Sharing' organization policy is enforced**

The 'Domain Restricted Sharing' organization policy (constraints/iam.allowedPolicyMemberDomains) is enforced by default depending on how and when your organization was created in Google Cloud.

To override this policy, follow the steps below:

01. In Google Cloud, select your organization’s name (it will show a building icon next to it, not 3 hexagons)
02. Click the **Menu** icon (3 lines), then **IAM & Admin**, then **Organization policies**
03. In the Filter search bar, type or paste in “Domain restricted sharing”
04. Click **Domain restricted sharing**
05. Click **Manage Policy**
06. Under Policy source, select **Override parent’s policy**
07. Under Policy enforcement, select **Replace**
08. Under Policy values, select **Allow All**
09. Click **Done**
10. Click **Set Policy**

Once this is complete you can proceed with [Grant Thinkific Access to Your Google Cloud Project](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#h_01JM0PMRKQN8WS81MG92ZEDGDJ).

**I can't create my Google Cloud Project**

If you're following _Option 2: Set up a Google Cloud Project_ _without_ _an Organization_ and you encounter one of the following blockers:

- Google asks you to “Set up your organization” or verify your domain, OR
- You cannot continue without completing organization setup

Your email domain is managed by Google Workspace or Cloud Identity and Google is enforcing your company’s existing setup.

Switch to [Option 1: Set up a Google Cloud Project under an Organization](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14510318393111-Prepare-Your-Android-Branded-Mobile-App#googlecloud) instead.

## More Branded Mobile App Resources

_This article outlines the most recent Thinkific Mobile App and Branded Mobile App updates. Refer back to this article for updates as we continue to expand functionality!_

[![](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/17440655408663)](https://thinkific.com/branded-mobile/?utm_source=knowledge_base&utm_medium=help_center&utm_campaign=BrandedMobile2023)

## In this article:

[Overview](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14454992010135-Mobile-App-Recent-Updates#overview)

[Important Considerations](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14454992010135-Mobile-App-Recent-Updates#important)

[Latest Features](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14454992010135-Mobile-App-Recent-Updates#latest)

[App Version Changelog](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14454992010135-Mobile-App-Recent-Updates#changelog)

## Overview

The Thinkific Mobile App and Branded Mobile App allow your students to easily access their courses and communities when and where it works best for them, using a native app on their mobile devices.

This article outlines recently released mobile features.

> This article will continue to be updated as new features are released, so keep checking back for the latest news on what is currently available!

## Important Considerations

- As Thinkific's mobile offerings are regularly being updated, features that are currently unavailable may become available down the line. Keep checking back for the latest updates on what is available.
- For the full list of features available on the Thinkific Mobile app, see [Increase Engagement With the New Thinkific Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10664253689367#features).
- For the full list of features available on Branded Mobile apps, see [Maximize Your Brand Potential With the Branded Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/13166713617431#features).
- See this article to learn how to update the Thinkific mobile app: [How Can I Update the Thinkific Mobile App? (Student Resource)](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14531474895383).

## Latest Features

Click to expand the dropdowns below to learn more about each update.

**Support for Additional Product Types**

[Digital Downloads](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/22664397991575) and [Coaching & Webinar products](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/24088621291927) are now available in the Thinkific and Branded mobile apps! You learners can now access these products, alongside courses and communities, all on the go.

**Support for All Lesson Types**

Now all lesson types are supported within the mobile app - your students no longer have to navigate to the web to complete courses! Your content will be available in the app for every single lesson type, including Multimedia Lessons, Presentations, Live Lessons, Quizzes, Surveys, Assignments, and Brillium exams!

> [Disqus Discussion lessons](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030740893) are not supported on the mobile app, as the integration is no longer available on new Thinkific accounts created after May 2021. When trying to access a Disqus lesson, your learners will have the option to skip the lesson or view it outside of the app.

**Support for Multiple Languages**

Our apps now support 25 of our most popular languages. The app locales (buttons and navigation) now support: Chinese - Traditional, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hungarian, Italian, Japanese, Latvian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Slovenian, Spanish, Spanish - Mexican, Swedish, Turkish, Vietnamese.

The language setting for the mobile app is determined by the language of the device and applies to the default text only (e.g. buttons, tab names, etc).

**Custom SSO Support**

The Thinkific and Branded apps now support [Custom SSO](https://support.thinkific.dev/hc/en-us/articles/4423909018135) flow! Your learners can log in to your app using your identity provider. [OpenID Connect SSO](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/4412003630871) will continue to be supported.

> Please reach out to your Thinkific CSM or our [Support team](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030719413) to enable this feature

**In-App Purchases**

> This feature is exclusive to creators using [Branded apps](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/13166713617431).

Take your audience’s learning journey to new heights! Your users can now expand their skills by purchasing new courses directly within your mobile app. With Apple and Google Play’s in-app purchase systems, they can easily tap, purchase, and get access to new courses.

Revenue from in-app purchases will be deposited directly into your bank accounts from the app stores. You can also see all purchases made from within your branded app, by going to the Orders tab of your Thinkific site.

This feature is exclusive to creators using Branded apps. For most Branded apps, in-app purchases will be required for your app to be approved in the app stores.

Learn more about it here: [Branded Mobile: In-App Purchases](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16261125243159).

**Direct Messaging**

Direct messaging enables private, real-time communication between learners and educators, as well as peer-to-peer, without the need to post publicly. This unlocks a more personal, high-touch experience that boosts trust, retention, and overall community engagement!

Learn more about it here: [Communities: Direct Messaging](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/32401372005783-Communities-Direct-Messaging).

We are always working on updating the app and adding new features that bring the most value to you and your students.

> If you have feedback about what you'd like to see in the app, we want to know! Please [contact us](https://thinkific.com/contact/) to let us know what functionality would be most valuable to you!

## App Version Changelog

Release date: March 12, 2026

This version contains:

- **Community updates:** We are bringing a lot of functionality to the community experience on mobile. These updates include: the community list screen, the ability to include video attachments, multi-attachment support, members list, members profiles, and post reactions.
- **Direct Messaging updates:** We are bringing a lot of functionality to the direct messaging experience on mobile. These updates include: reactions in direct messages, the ability to edit direct messages, and the ability to block users.

**Version 2.7**

Release date: February 20, 2026

- **Events tab:** Your learners can now see the [Coaching & Webinar products](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/24088621291927) and [Community Events](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/6746444680087) directly in their mobile app!

It's designed to help your students find products easily and includes courses, digital downloads, and communities. The page includes search and filter functionality for easier navigation.

Release date: August 2, 2023

This version contains:

- **Collapsable chapters:** Course chapters are now collapsable, making it quicker and easier to navigate to specific content without having to scroll past lots of lessons.
- **Bug fixes & Other Improvements:** As always, we’ve been hard at work fixing bugs and enhancing your user experience.


**Version 1.4**

Release date: July 24, 2023

Get ready! We’ve got some amazing new features lined up on the mobile app.

- **Search:** Students can now search for courses, making it easier than ever to find the specific content they are looking for.
- **Categories:** Students can filter by one or multiple categories, to help narrow down their search for courses.
- **Multiple Languages:** Spanish, German, and Swedish language support has been added to the mobile app, meaning students with languages in those locales will see those languages automatically.
- **Improved bottom navigation:** The app navigation and architecture have been improved, and communities made more prominent and useful.
- **Bug fixes & Other Improvements:** As always, we’ve been hard at work fixing bugs and enhancing your user experience.  - **Empty state improvement**: more informative empty if a user is not enrolled in any products.
  - **French translations improved**
  - **Community loading speeds improved**
  - **App loading times reduced**

The below features are unique to Branded mobile apps. See this article to learn more about the Branded mobile solution: [Maximize Your Brand Potential With the Branded Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/13166713617431)

- **In-App purchase improvements: add a product, refunds, and search for courses:** You can now add products for sale for in-app purchases using the product IDs in the Mobile settings section of your Thinkific site. Additionally, refunds are now supported via the App Store and the Play store, making it easier to manage student enrollments and cancellations. Learn more about it here: [Branded Mobile: In-App Purchases](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16261125243159).
- **Automatic branded app updates:** When new app versions are created, they will automatically be submitted for review and pushed live to your app store listings on your behalf - saving you time and getting the latest and greatest app version in your audience’s hands faster than ever.


**Version 1.3**

Release date: June 28, 2023

Get ready! We’ve got some amazing new features lined up on the mobile app

- **Downloadable Content for Enhanced Learning:** Downloadable content can now accompany video lessons, allowing you to download and later access course materials even when you’re offline
- **Course Thumbnails Now Take Center Stage:** Get a glimpse of what you can expect from courses in-app with full-size course thumbnail imagery.
- **Bug fixes & Other Improvements:** As always, we’ve been hard at work fixing bugs and enhancing your user experience.  - **Video lesson support**: Videos in landscape mode and full screen now work as expected. Additionally, videos will now play on more Android devices.
  - **Course prerequisite progress:** Prerequisite lessons now count towards your progress and will automatically update the course completion progress bar.
  - **Additional upload formats are now supported in Communities:** Users on Android devices can now upload more image types to their mobile communities.

The below features are unique to Branded mobile apps. See this article to learn more about the Branded mobile solution: [Maximize Your Brand Potential With the Branded Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/13166713617431)

- **Enable your students to continue their learning with in-app purchases:** Take your audience’s learning journey to new heights! Your users can now expand their skills by purchasing new courses directly within your mobile app. With Apple and Google Play’s in-app purchase systems, they can easily tap, purchase and get access to new courses.

Simply set up course IDs within your Thinkific account and copy those directly into Apple or Google, set your price and your course is ready to sell!

This feature is exclusive to creators using Branded apps. If you’re interested in setting this up for your mobile app, reach out to your CSM and they will be happy to connect you with a member of the Thinkific mobile team.
- **Collect payments for purchases instantly:** Revenue from in-app purchases will deposit directly into your bank accounts from the app stores. You can also see all purchases made from within your branded app, by going to the Orders tab of your Thinkific site.

**Version 1.2**

Release date: May 11, 2023

Get ready to take your mobile app experience to the next level with these exciting new features and enhancements!

- **Liking posts within a Community:** You can now express your appreciation for posts by giving them a 'like' - spread the love and support for your learners!
- **Easily find your school:** We’ve made some great improvements to the app's search function, making it easier and quicker for your audience to find their school or organization.
- **Fresh design enhancements:** We've given the app's welcome screen a stylish rebrand, complete with beautiful animations that are sure to delight the eyes.
- **Bug Fixes and Other Improvements:** As always, we've been hard at work fixing bugs and enhancing the user experience.
- **Notifications:** Say goodbye to pesky bugs like persistent notification errors and timeouts when querying courses with more than 40 lessons.
- **UI improvements:** We've also made some UI improvements, such as better course card sizing and a fix for the video player's fullscreen button.

The below features are unique to Branded mobile apps. See this article to learn more about the Branded mobile solution: [Maximize Your Brand Potential With the Branded Mobile App](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/13166713617431)

- **Make sharing easy with deep links:** Want to share a specific section of a course or a community space with your audience? With deep links, you can now copy and share links that will automatically bring your peers to a specific location within the mobile app.
- **Account deletion:** Your users can now delete their accounts from within your mobile app by accessing the profile page.

## Learn More About the Thinkific Mobile App

web.description: With Branded Mobile by Thinkific, we'll build and maintain a white-labeled app for your online courses and communities so you can focus on what you do best.
web.markdown:
[Skip to main content](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14290873077911-Branded-Mobile-Important-Considerations#main-content)

Plan Availability- Mobile


Legacy Plans- Mobile


Platform- Mobile


_With Branded Mobile by Thinkific, we'll build and maintain a white-labeled app for your online courses and communities so you can focus on what you do best. This article will outline some key considerations when it comes to the Branded Mobile app solution._

[![](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/17440963185559)](https://thinkific.com/branded-mobile/?utm_source=knowledge_base&utm_medium=help_center&utm_campaign=BrandedMobile2023)

## In this article:

[About This Feature](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14290873077911-Branded-Mobile-Important-Considerations#about)

[In-App Payments Requirements](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14290873077911-Branded-Mobile-Important-Considerations#iapreqs)

[Apple SSO and Account Duplication](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14290873077911-Branded-Mobile-Important-Considerations#applesso)

[Frequently Asked Questions](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/14290873077911-Branded-Mobile-Important-Considerations#faq)

## About This Feature

Increase brand visibility and recognition with a white-labeled mobile app that has your own logo, colors, and style for a continuous experience across all channels.

A branded mobile app will fit into your audience’s existing routines, making it easier for them to learn and engage with your content — all on their own schedule. This means higher course completion rates, improved student satisfaction, and more revenue opportunities for your business.

There are some key considerations that you need to be aware of when it comes to the Branded Mobile solution.

> This article will continue to be updated, so keep checking back for the updated list of considerations.

## In-App Payments Requirements

Apple [requires](https://developer.apple.com/app-store/review/guidelines/#payments) that any digital goods (such as paid Thinkific courses) purchasable outside of the Apple App Store must also be available to purchase within the branded mobile app using [in-app purchases](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16261125243159). If your account includes paid courses, it is likely to be flagged during the review process.

We recommend that you provide us with one or more courses for in-app purchase from the start to ensure that the Apple review process proceeds smoothly. This can be an existing course that you offer, or maybe a low-cost "taster" course or resources guide, etc.

Note that Apple may waive the requirement for in-app purchases for a few reasons. If you believe you qualify for any of the following exemptions, please let Thinkific know as quickly as possible:

- Your courses are free of charge
- Your courses are sold primarily to businesses (b2b), who make courses available to the end consumer (for details, see [here](https://developer.apple.com/app-store/review/guidelines/#enterprise-services))
- Your courses are bundled with physical goods or services (b2c), such as courses bundled with textbooks or courses offered as extended learning from a conference (for details, see [here](https://developer.apple.com/app-store/review/guidelines/#goods-and-services-outside-of-the-app))

## Apple SSO and Account Duplication

Your branded mobile app built by Thinkific needs to support the Apple SSO (Single Sign On) option, as required by Apple. This gives students to ability to log in to your site using their Apple ID.

When signing in to your site using the Apple sign-in option, your students will see two options: _Share My Email_ and _Hide My Email_. We recommend that your students select the option that they initially used when setting up their account. Learn more here: [What is Sign in with Apple?](https://support.apple.com/en-us/HT210318)

For students who previously used their actual email or the _Share My Email_ option, we recommend that they **do not** choose _Hide My Email_. Choosing this option while logging in, will create a brand new account meaning that the student will not be able to access their existing account.

To mitigate this, encourage your students to use the same login option they originally used when signing up on your site.

If a student has created a duplicate account, you can delete the duplicate user by following these instructions: [How to Delete a User](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360036378154).

> If a student registers on your site using Apple Sign in option, they will be registered as Apple User, due to the way the Apple SSO (Single Sign On) interacts with our platform.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Can I remove the Apple Single Sign On login option?**

No, this is the requirement set by Apple and cannot be changed.
